rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"When Write permission is denied mid-pipeline, the agent committed skill docs + pipeline state instead of the required implementation files. The task silently failed without surfacing the permission er","scope":"pipeline execution"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A failed plan-write (permission denied) led to a silent FAIL rather than surfacing the error — the root cause was masked by the pipeline state commit.","scope":"pipeline execution"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Taskify correctly identified that the Write tool needs explicit permission grants; this should block the build stage from running if the plan was never written.","scope":"pipeline gating"}]}
